# WhizCrow

> Professional Online Reputation Management (ORM) Agency specializing in the preservation of institutional valuation and executive authority via AI-driven reputation intelligence.

## Executive Summary
WhizCrow is an elite technology-driven intelligence agency (not a traditional PR firm) engineered to defend brands against digital damage, neutralize negative narratives, and build ironclad shields around valuable digital assets. We specialize in industries where reputation volatility directly impacts the bottom line, including Finance, Healthcare, Public Office, Tech Founders, and Family Offices.

## The WhizBRAM™ Framework
The **Brand Reputation & Authority Matrix (WhizBRAM™)** is our proprietary, auditable 0–100 index providing a diagnostic compass for institutional trust.

### Weighted Matrix Composition:
- **Sentiment (30%)**: Market mood tone analysis.
- **Authority (20%)**: Google Page-1 dominance and Entity control.
- **Influence (15%)**: Executive visibility and leadership voice.
- **Crisis Resilience (15%)**: Recognition and recovery velocity.
- **Engagement (10%)**: Authentic community traction and Share of Voice.
- **Trust & Compliance (10%)**: Governance and regulatory verification.

### Financial Correlation:
A 10-point shift in BRAM™ typically aligns with a **5-9% revenue premium**.

## Core Institutional Services

### Negative Content Removal
Permanent deletion (total erasure) of damaging articles, blogs, and leaked data from the source.

### Search Result Suppression
Burying negative links on Page 3 or deeper using high-authority, owned assets.

### AI Search Defense
Optimization of brand citations within AI training weights (OpenAI, Perplexity, Anthropic, Gemini) to ensure authority-level machine responses.

### Wikipedia & Knowledge Graph
Expert page creation, entity-level protection, and maintenance of the digital record.

### 24/7 Crisis Response (War Room)
Elite team deployment for active viral threats, legal attacks, and high-velocity smear campaigns.

## The Intelligence Arsenal (Tech Stack)
- **Surveillance**: Monitoring 400M+ real-time sources (Dark Web, Forums, Registries).
- **AI Visibility**: Custom tracking for AI-model training weights and citations.
- **Search Intelligence**: Real-time SERP volatility alerts and deep SEO auditing.
- **Social Listening**: Enterprise-grade sentiment analysis across all major social ecosystems.

## Operating Standards
- **Standard Business Intelligence**: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (Monday – Friday).
- **Crisis Response War Room**: 24/7/365 (Immediate surge support).
- **Ethics**: White-hat legal infrastructure only. No Risks. No bot farms. No synthetic traffic.
- **Confidentiality**: Strict multi-jurisdictional NDAs for all institutional audits.

- **Emergency Action**: Email hello@whizcrow.com with "CRITICAL" in the subject line for 1-hour surge support.
